name: Bofig Investigative Evidence
description: Evidence graph collections for investigative journalism. Three collections: evidence records, claims, and relationships between them. All collections have full PROMPT scoring and provenance tracking.

collections.name: bofig_evidence
collections.description: Core evidence records — documents, testimonies, financial records ingested via Docudactyl or manual entry. Each record carries PROMPT scores and provenance metadata.

fields.name: investigation_id
fields.description: Investigation this evidence belongs to

fields.name: title
fields.description: Human-readable title for the evidence

fields.name: evidence_type
fields.description: Classification of evidence source type

fields.name: content_text
fields.description: Extracted text content (OCR'd if from scanned document)

fields.name: url_source
fields.description: URL or file path to original source document

fields.name: sha256_hash
fields.description: SHA-256 hash for deduplication and integrity verification

fields.name: perceptual_hash
fields.description: Perceptual hash for near-duplicate image detection

fields.name: ocr_confidence
fields.description: Tesseract OCR confidence score (if applicable)

fields.name: language
fields.description: ISO 639-1 language code of primary content

fields.name: document_date
fields.description: Date of the original document (not ingestion date)

fields.name: entities_extracted
fields.description: NER-extracted entity names (people, orgs, locations)

fields.name: keywords
fields.description: Auto-extracted keywords from content

fields.name: redaction_status
fields.description: Whether document contains redactions and recovery status

fields.name: redaction_count
fields.description: Number of detected redaction annotations

fields.name: extraction_run_id
fields.description: Docudactyl pipeline run identifier for provenance

fields.name: dublin_core_metadata
fields.description: Dublin Core metadata as JSON (creator, publisher, rights, etc.)

fields.name: sensitivity_level
fields.description: Access control classification

fields.name: prompt_provenance
fields.description: PROMPT: Data source documentation and chain of custody

fields.name: prompt_replicability
fields.description: PROMPT: Can the evidence be independently verified?

fields.name: prompt_objectivity
fields.description: PROMPT: Freedom from bias or conflicts of interest

fields.name: prompt_methodology
fields.description: PROMPT: Quality of evidence collection methodology

fields.name: prompt_publication
fields.description: PROMPT: Publication venue credibility (court vs tabloid)

fields.name: prompt_timeliness
fields.description: PROMPT: Currency and relevance of the evidence

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Analyst notes and observations

records.title: Flight Log — N908JE — 2002-03-15
records.content_text: Departure: Teterboro (TEB). Arrival: St. Thomas (STT). Passengers: JE, GM, JD3, JD7...
records.notes: Passenger initials cross-referenced with deposition testimony

records.title: Giuffre v. Maxwell — Deposition Transcript (2016)
records.content_text: Q: Can you describe what happened when you arrived at the property?...
records.notes: Court-ordered release. 47 redactions, some names recoverable from context.

collections.name: bofig_claims
collections.description: Claims extracted from evidence — specific factual assertions that can be corroborated, contradicted, or qualified. Each claim links to supporting evidence and carries a confidence score.

fields.name: claim_text
fields.description: The specific factual assertion

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Confidence in claim accuracy (0-100)

fields.name: source_evidence_ids
fields.description: Evidence record IDs supporting this claim

fields.name: speaker_id
fields.description: Entity ID of person who made this claim (for testimony)

fields.name: claim_date
fields.description: Date the claimed event occurred

fields.name: assertion_date
fields.description: Date the claim was made (deposition date, filing date, etc.)

fields.name: corroboration_count
fields.description: Number of independent sources corroborating this claim

fields.name: contradiction_count
fields.description: Number of sources contradicting this claim

fields.name: impeachment_flag
fields.description: Whether the speaker has contradicted their own claim

records.claim_text: Jeffrey Epstein flew from Teterboro to St. Thomas on 2002-03-15 with at least 4 passengers

collections.name: bofig_entities
collections.description: Resolved entities (people, organizations, locations) with alias tracking for co-reference resolution. Merges and splits are journaled and reversible.

fields.name: primary_name
fields.description: Canonical name for this entity

fields.name: aliases
fields.description: All known aliases and name variants

fields.name: description
fields.description: Brief description of entity role in investigation

fields.name: first_appearance_date
fields.description: Earliest document date mentioning this entity

fields.name: document_count
fields.description: Number of documents mentioning this entity

fields.name: credibility_score
fields.description: Current credibility score (for witness entities)

fields.name: merge_history
fields.description: JSON log of entity merge/split operations

collections.name: bofig_financial_transactions
collections.description: Financial transactions extracted from bank records, wire transfers, and financial filings. Supports chain analysis and anomaly detection.

fields.name: source_entity_id
fields.description: Entity ID of the sender/payer

fields.name: destination_entity_id
fields.description: Entity ID of the receiver/payee

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Transaction amount in original currency

fields.name: instrument
fields.description: Payment instrument or method

fields.name: intermediary_entity_id
fields.description: Entity ID of any intermediary (bank, shell company, trust)

fields.name: source_account
fields.description: Account identifier (masked for privacy)

fields.name: destination_account
fields.description: Destination account identifier

fields.name: source_evidence_id
fields.description: Evidence record this transaction was extracted from

fields.name: anomaly_flags
fields.description: Automated anomaly detection flags

records.notes: Monthly payment to MC2 Model Management

edge_collections.name: bofig_relationships
edge_collections.description: Weighted edges connecting evidence, claims, and entities. Relationship types indicate evidential support, contradiction, involvement, or temporal sequence.

fields.name: weight
fields.description: Relationship strength (0-100)

fields.name: reasoning
fields.description: Non-empty rationale for this relationship (Lithoglyph invariant)

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Confidence in relationship accuracy

fields.name: automated
fields.description: How this relationship was established
